author: unpreditable
description: A dedicated panel to organize tasks across the vault using the Getting Things Done methodology (Today, This Week, Someday…) - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Vitaly Ditman
manifest.description: A dedicated panel to organize tasks across the vault using the Getting Things Done methodology (Today, This Week, Someday…).
manifest.name: GTD Tasks

name: GTD Tasks

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Fix**

- Fix displaying wrong line in file on task selection for files edited at the top

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
New Features

  - Localization — The plugin UI is now available in 12 languages: German, French, Spanish, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Russian, Portuguese, Ukrainian, Latvian, Estonian, and Lithuanian. Language follows your Obsidian locale setting automatically.
  - Reuse existing tab on navigation — Clicking a task to open its file now focuses an already-open tab instead of opening a duplicate.

  Improvements

  - Task text now fills the full row width in the sidebar; quick-move buttons appear on hover.
  - Settings tab updated to follow Obsidian 1.13.0+ API guidelines.

  Project & Tooling

  - Added CONTRIBUTING.md — contributions are welcome!
  - Added PR validation workflow with build verification and translation completeness checks.
  - Translation validation now runs as a mandatory build step to catch missing keys early.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
####  New Features
- Task source in tooltip — Hovering a task now shows the source file and line number at a glance.

####  Under The Hood
- Minor CSS fixes to adhere to best practices.
- Upgraded attest-build-provenance GitHub Action v2 → v3 for Node.js 24 compatibility.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
#### New Features
- Search/filter in sidebar panel — Real-time case-insensitive text filter in the panel header; empty buckets hide while filtering; match count shown as a dismissible pill (clearable via click, ×, or Escape)

#### Under the Hood
- Release artifacts are now cryptographically signed to verify each build is genuine and produced from official source
- Resolved internal code warnings and aligned with current Obsidian API recommendations, reducing technical debt
- Minimum Obsidian version bumped to 1.7.2

releases.author: Unpreditable
releases.description:
### Fixes
- Fixed tasks indented under plain bullet points incorrectly appearing as subtasks of an unrelated task in the sidebar.

releases.author: Unpreditable
releases.description:
### New Features
- **Inline markdown rendering** — Task text in the sidebar now renders bold, italic, strikethrough, inline code, highlights, and markdown links visually, matching how they appear in your notes.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
New Features

  - Dismiss button for completed tasks — completed tasks now show a dismiss button instead of move buttons, keeping the UI focused on actionable items
  - Dismiss All button — a "Dismiss All" button in the panel header lets you clear all completed tasks at once

  CI / Tooling

  - Added a manual GitHub Actions release workflow with semver bump (Major / Minor / Patch dropdown)

releases.author: Unpreditable
releases.description:
New Features                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                          
- Wikilink rendering — wikilinks in task text now render as bold in the sidebar
- Clickable status bar — bucket counts in the status bar are now clickable

Fixes

- Restored full opacity on tooltips for completed tasks
- Resolved stale task data causing move failures

Upgrades / Refactors

- Migrated to Svelte 5 (replaced deprecated svelte/legacy with stores)
- Added ESLint with the obsidianmd plugin; applied lint fixes across codebase
- Updated UI strings to Sentence Case

releases.author: Unpreditable
releases.description:
Features                                                                                                                                                   
- GTD sidebar panel — groups tasks from your vault into time-horizon buckets (Today, This Week, Someday, etc.)                                          
- One-click and drag-and-drop task moves between priority buckets
- Subtask support with hierarchy and bucket inheritance
- Status bar counters showing live task counts per bucket
- Celebration animations on task completion, with configurable intensity
- Compact view mode for a denser task list
- Two storage modes — inline tags (#gtd/today) or Dataview-compatible inline fields
releases.name: 0.1.0 - Initial Release
